_publications._publicationTitle: Survival of Human Neurofibroma in Immunodeficient Mice and Initial Results of Therapy With Pirfenidone.

_contextSnippet: The survival of the neurofibroma xenografts in the various locations ranged from 84.6% to 100% ( Table 1 ).
details: Survival rates ranged from 84.6% to 100% across various implantation locations without treatment over 6 weeks
